47243.title: Doctor Who : Spyfall
47243.description: Intelligence agents around the world are under attack from alien forces, so MI6 turn to the only people who can help: the Doctor and friends. As they travel the globe looking for answers, attacks come from all sides. Earth's security rests on the team's shoulders, but where will this planet-threatening conspiracy lead them?

47244.title: Bad Move : Day Trip
47244.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

47245.title: Bad Move : Party Time
47245.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

47246.title: Ordinary Lies : Fletch
47246.description: Fletch and wife Caz are the rock-solid office couple. However, when Caz oversteps the mark sending Fletch on a downward spiral, he wonders if she really is the right woman for him.

47247.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Skis
47247.description: Richard is not exactly over the moon with his birthday present, but that is only the start of a series of problems.

47248.title: Casualty
47248.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

47249.title: Impossible
47249.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

47250.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : Exit, Pursued by a Bear
47250.description: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a former soap star who's about to stage her return to the limelight.

47251.title: Bad Move : Party Time
47251.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

47252.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Skis
47252.description: Richard is not exactly over the moon with his birthday present, but that is only the start of a series of problems.

47253.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
47253.description: The show reaches its climax as the three finalists enter the sewing room for the very last time. The sewing experts must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer as they set three tough `couture' themed challenges.

47254.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : Exit, Pursued by a Bear
47254.description: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a former soap star who's about to stage her return to the limelight.

47255.title: Bargain Hunt : Hemswell 27
47255.description: At the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, a father and daughter take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, and they all have their sights set on a golden gavel. One team falls in love with a handmade dolls house while the other team sets sights on a pair of Edwardian glass eyes. Also, Anita travels to Sheffield, famous for its cutlery industry, to uncover the story of some pioneering women: the infamous Buffer Girls.

47256.title: Casualty
47256.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

47257.title: Call the Midwife
47257.description: With modern advances starting to change things for the better, even medical professionals like Dr Turner and Shelagh are forced to consider their own lifestyles. As they fight for better respiratory health for their patients, Timothy realises the risks his parents are running themselves by continuing to smoke.

47258.title: Call the Midwife
47258.description: A spate of violent attacks on women brings a state of fear to Poplar, and impacts directly on the residents of Nonnatus House. A secret pregnancy threatens the life of a young girl after her mother takes matters into her own hands. Meanwhile, a long overdue holiday for the Turner family fails to live up to expectations.

47259.title: Doctors : The Good, the Bad and the Blood Pressurey

47263.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
47263.description: The show reaches its climax as the three finalists enter the sewing room for the very last time. The sewing experts must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer as they set three tough `couture' themed challenges.

47264.title: EastEnders
47264.description: Callum's attempt to prove himself ends in ruin, Ruby goes head to head with Lily, and Rainie and Vi clash as Phil makes Kat an unexpected offer.

47268.title: Casualty
47268.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

47269.title: Impossible
47269.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

47270.title: Impossible
47270.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

47271.title: Antiques Roadshow : Erddig 2
47271.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

47272.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build : Torquay
47272.description: In Torquay, the team and local kind volunteers step up to help single dad Stuart, who has suffered with progressive multiple sclerosis since his now 15-year-old daughter Lauren was born. His primary carer is his mum, Grandma Lin, who is blind.
47272.category: Home & Garden, Doe-het-zelf, Bouwen en verbouwen, Kunstnijverheid

47273.title: Doctor Who : Spyfall
47273.description: A terrifying plan to destroy humanity is about to reach fruition. The Doctor and her friends must escape multiple traps and defeat a deadly alliance.

47275.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
47275.description: Faced with some of the toughest challenges that live television can throw at a man: rancour behind the scenes, a viewer in danger, and a segment on ladies' fashion, Alan calls on `Sidekick' Simon Denton to step up to the plate.

47277.title: Friday Night Dinner : The Tin of Meat
47277.description: Mum's friend Val moves in and causes havoc when she finds that Dad is hiding a tin of 20-year-old meat in his shed.

47278.title: Still Open All Hours
47278.description: Granville has a large quantity of bargain spectacles to sell. Meanwhile, encouraged by reading a self-help book, Mr Newbold decides to tell Mrs Featherstone how he really feels about their relationship, Eric tries to persuade Kath to go on a camping holiday and what is in the large, heavy box that has arrived for Leroy?
